prompt: Ultra-realistic close-up macro photograph of a baker's hands actively working sourdough on a floured stone work surface. The hands belong to an experienced baker — strong, slightly calloused, flour embedded in the skin creases, dough clinging between the fingers. The dough itself is creamy white, slightly glossy with surface tension, being stretched in a folding motion. Scattered flour on the dark stone surface. Extreme close-up, tight crop on just hands and dough. 100mm macro lens, f/2.8, ISO 200. Dramatic side lighting from a single window, warm and directional, creating deep texture shadows in the dough folds and skin. No face visible, only the craft of the hands. Documentary realism, tactile and authentic.
negative_prompt: gloves, young smooth hands, airbrushed skin, plastic dough, CGI, cartoon, artificial light, studio, overexposed, generic stock, clean hands without flour, oversaturated, low quality, blurry, watermark

settings.lighting: single directional warm window side light, deep shadows
settings.depth_of_field: shallow macro, hands and immediate dough sharp
settings.quality: ultra high detail, visible skin texture, flour particles, dough gloss
